overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. A character in a teal dress walks along rain-slicked neon-lit streets, stops at an intersection to wait for traffic, and crosses the road among other pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas. The scene features high-end game engine graphics with reflective wet surfaces, vibrant neon signage, and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway between futuristic glass buildings

events.description: pedestrian with pink glowing umbrella passes close to camera on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past other pedestrians with glowing umbrellas

notable_agents.action: woman in teal dress with blonde hair walking confidently forward
pedestrian in white shirt and light pants walking ahead with purple umbrella

building facade covered in large illuminated digital advertisements and neon signage
low concrete barrier separating sidewalk from lower building level
tall pole with bright rectangular light fixture

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-slicked sidewalk between towering futuristic buildings with glass facades and neon billboards. Other pedestrians with glowing umbrellas walk ahead and alongside. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant purple and blue neon lights from the surrounding architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with traffic signal and crosswalk projection

events.description: character stops at street corner next to traffic pole to wait for vehicles to pass
futuristic yellow taxi and silver truck drive past on the wet multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: standing at the corner near a traffic pole, watching vehicles pass by before crossing

notable_agents.action: yellow futuristic taxi driving past the intersection with headlights on
pedestrian in red pants walking away in the distance along the sidewalk

entered.detail: thick dark pole with traffic lights and crosswalk signal projectors
ground-projected red WAIT and green WALK signals on the crosswalk stripes

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a street corner next to a traffic pole, waiting for the signal to cross. Futuristic vehicles including a yellow taxi drive past on the wet road. The ground displays projected crosswalk signals, and the surrounding area is illuminated by mixed neon and street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated pedestrian crosswalk with projected walk signals

events.description: character begins crossing the street as the ground projection changes to green WALK signal
character reaches the opposite curb and steps up onto the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide striped crosswalk with other pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians with glowing umbrellas waiting at the corner to cross
pedestrian in red hat and dark clothing crossing in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow and white stripes on wet asphalt
concrete sidewalk on the far side of the intersection with curb and escalator entrance

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the multi-lane street on a wide striped crosswalk illuminated by ground-projected walk signals. Other pedestrians with colorful glowing umbrellas cross in various directions. The wet asphalt reflects the neon lights as the character reaches the opposite curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with escalator access and building entrances

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past an escalator entrance and red fire hydrant

notable_agents.action: woman with red umbrella walking ahead up the sidewalk toward escalator

entered.detail: metal and glass escalator entrance leading to upper levels with illuminated sides
bright red fire hydrant on the sidewalk near the building wall
silver metal railing along the escalator and sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the far sidewalk, passing a red fire hydrant and an escalator entrance with metal railings. The area features modern building entrances with glass facades and digital advertisement screens. The pavement remains wet with neon reflections as the character continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district as a character navigates from a neon-lit sidewalk across a busy futuristic intersection. It begins with the character walking between towering glass facades and vibrant billboards, where the wet pavement mirrors deep purple and blue hues. As the character reaches a street corner, the movement pauses beside a traffic pole to let futuristic vehicles and a yellow taxi stream past under the glow of projected crosswalk signals. The scene then shifts as the character steps onto the wide, striped crossing, weaving through a crowd of pedestrians with colorful glowing umbrellas while the asphalt reflects the surrounding city lights. Finally, the camera follows the character onto the opposite curb, passing a red fire hydrant and a metal escalator entrance as they continue forward past digital advertisement screens.
